title: leptochloa digitaria
intro: Leptochloa digitaria, also known as finger grass, is a type of grassy weed that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Leptochloa digitaria are said to include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Leptochloa digitaria typically involve boiling the leaves and stems in water to make a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
